creator: karl@pielorz.com
text:
(In reply to Roger Pau MonnÃ© from comment #14)

Hi,

I just moved the VM back & forth over two nodes - after 5 migrations, I got a bunch of 30 calcru warnings on the console (just the once, shortly after the migration).

It took another 43 migrations before the 'calcru' console messages popped up again (5 this time - and again, shortly after the migration).

They only pop up once. Everything else seems OK (and after all those migrations - the clock is still in sync).

So it's reproducible - but not "very" reproducible. I seem to remember seeing similar errors with vmWare Workstation a while ago due to various "weird timing things" that happen in VM's

If it's not doing any harm - I'm more than happy to have this happening than the clocks getting out of sync!

-Karl
